svg.text: QPSK 4th-power alias limit: wrapped estimate versus symbol error

text.tspan: The 4th-power front end is only unique while |ω| < π/4.
Past that point, a clean-looking corner cloud can still hide wrong symbols.
Amber = true offset minus that estimate, wrapped back to (-π, π].
It still looks calm even after the alias fold.
It does not forgive a quarter-turn ramp from symbol to symbol.
